core_principles: Clarity over Decoration: Every pixel must serve the measurement.
Tactile Precision: Tools must feel like physical instruments (snapping, guides).
Data Density: Show maximum information without clutter using collapsible panels.
Finnish Functionalism: Minimalist, durable, honest design.

sidebar_right.content: Tabbed Panel: Takeoff Data, Presets, Cost Estimation

buttons.primary: bg-[#0052CC] hover:bg-[#0043A8] text-white shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

inputs.base: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#0052CC] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

general: Use 'Manrope' for all UI headings and 'Public Sans' for body text.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numerical data in the takeoff table.
The layout must be fixed height (100vh) with internal scrolling for panels.
PDF rendering must be high-performance using pdf.js. Implement lazy loading for pages.
Measurement tools must have a 'snapping' feel (even if simulated visual feedback).
Cost calculation needs to be real-time as users modify measurements.
Use the 'Finnish Blue' (#0052CC) as the primary action color.

specific_files.App.js: Main layout orchestrator. Manages state for 'projects', 'currentTool', 'scale'.
specific_files.components/PDFViewer.js: Wrapper for React-PDF. Handles canvas overlay for drawing.
specific_files.components/Toolbar.js: Floating or fixed toolbar for selecting tools (Line, Rect, Poly).
specific_files.utils/geometry.js: Helper functions for calculating area/length from coordinates.

state_management.persistence: All state changes (measurements, scale, project name) must be saved to localStorage immediately.
state_management.export: Project export creates a JSON file containing all measurements and metadata.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic SaaS blue gradients. Use solid, authoritative blue.
Ensure high contrast for measurement lines against white/gray PDF backgrounds.
Micro-interactions: Hovering over a measurement in the table should highlight it on the canvas.
Input fields for costs/dimensions must be tabular and compact.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
